_comment: Single source of truth for credit pricing, read by python/credit_catalog.py and backend/billing.mjs. Edit values here to re-price without code changes. Loaders fall back per-key to the hardcoded defaults if a key is missing or this file is absent. Global knobs CREDIT_USD_VALUE / CREDIT_MARGIN / TTS_USD_PER_1K_CHARS stay env-configurable (env wins over this file).
